# Kenneth Nicasens — AI & Power Platform Notes

This site publishes practical articles on AI process design, Microsoft Power Platform, automation strategy, and agent-based operating models.

Primary language versions:
- English: https://kn-automations.be/
- Dutch: https://kn-automations.be/nl/

Important URLs:
- Sitemap (EN): https://kn-automations.be/sitemap.xml
- Sitemap (NL): https://kn-automations.be/nl/sitemap.xml
- Speaking: https://kn-automations.be/speaking
- About: https://kn-automations.be/about

Recent key articles:
- https://kn-automations.be/posts/from-copilot-to-agent-web
- https://kn-automations.be/posts/agentic-ai-lead-the-change
- https://kn-automations.be/posts/ai-true-power-beyond-chat

Usage guidance:
- Content may be summarized with attribution and source links.
- Keep quotes accurate and preserve technical context.
- Prefer canonical URLs from the live domain.
